title: SAPX reveals strategy to realise IDR 750 billion of revenue this year
body: By September 2024, SAPX's revenue had grown 16.58% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 523.35 billion, although net profit plummeted by 86.5% yoy due to rising operational costs.

title: 1st Financial Company releases 713 million shares of Bumi Resources (BRMS)
body: This foreign investor now owns just 9.55% of BRMS after releasing shares through BUT Deutsche Bank AG.

body: Around 61.55% will be used as working capital for infrastructure development.

title: ACES extends loan to subsidiary
body: "A loan of Rp 250 billion has been provided by the company to KLV for working capital purposes."

title: INDX supports palm downstream program
body: INDX is finalizing negotiations for three land purchase options in Pangandaran Regency.

title: Closing down marketplace, Bukalapak to shift to digital services
body: Bukalapak.com closes down its marketplace platform and shifts its business focus to digital products and services.

title: Bank lending grows 10.79%, NPL ratio improves
body: Bank lending figures continued their double-digit growth, followed by a manageable risk profile.

title: Jasnita Telekomindo expects 20% profit growth
body: JAST has launched a new service, an AI-based CCTV solution,

title: Net foreign volume recorded at 693 million shares
body: Energy infrastructure provider PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI) topped the list of the biggest net buys with 85.12 million shares.

title: INKP acquires DSSA power plant
body: Power plant assets include machinery with a total capacity of 175.1 MW along with its supporting equipment.

title: Mayora to liquidate subsidiary, here's why
body: It has been noted that Mayora Nederland still carries liabilities of around IDR 35 billion in the liquidation process.

title: JCI stagnates all day until closing
body: The movement of JCI remained flat, influenced by the decline in several banking stocks with large market capitalizations.

title: Agatha Nindya sells 58 million Techno9 Indonesia (NINE) shares
body: Agatha Nindya's sale of 58.74 million shares of PT Techno9 Indonesia Tbk (NINE) marked the start of market hints, or the purchasing and selling of shares by investors who possess more than 5% of the shares, on Friday, January 3.

title: Postponing EMGS approval, DEWA to continue to evaluating deficit elimination plan
body: DEWA recorded currency adjustments of Rp1.46 trillion, while the deficit or negative retained earnings amounted to Rp1.08 trillion.

title: KRYA to work on warehouse owned by Wings Group
body: KRYA carry out groundbreaking for Depo Tomo, a IDR 23.87 billion warehouse project from PT Niagatama Kencana (NK), a subsidiary of Wings Group.

title: CGAS shares down 69.82% a year after IPO
body: During its initial public offering (IPO) on 8 January 2024, CGAS shares were offered at IDR338 per share.

title: IDX suspends CLAY’s shares
body: In addition to the price decline, CLAY shares exhibited low liquidity.

title: Controlling shareholder increases stake in ALKA by 15%
body: PT Alakasa Industrindo Tbk (ALKA), a company operating in the metal and aluminum sector, announced that PT Gesit Perkasa has increased its shareholding to 15%.

title: Foreign investors sold 5 billion shares, leaving net sell of 1.83 billion shares
body: Foreign investors sold 5.43 billion shares of stock on Monday, January 6. This time, the net foreign concluded with a net sell of 1.83 billion shares, given the foreign purchases totaling 3.59 billion shares.

title: Borneo Logistik Indonesia divests 1.74 billion shares of Ancara Logistik Indonesia
body: The shares were not transferred very far, as on the same date, an acquisition of 1.74 billion shares was made by Borneo Logistics Services Pte Ltd (BLS).

title: Divesting HILL’s shares, HEM bags IDR 103.6 billion
body: PT Hillcon Equity Management (HEM) raised fresh funds of IDR 103.6 billion from divesting 37 million shares of PT Hillcon Tbk (HILL).

title: Yos Effendi Susanto raises stakes in PRAY
body: Yos Effendi Susanto has reportedly increased his portion in PRAY, the managing company of Awal Bros Sedaya Hospitals.

title: Eyeing extra capital, IATA to set up rights issue in March 2025
body: PT MNC Energy Investments Tbk (IATA) will issue 20.19 billion series B shares worth IDR 50 each in a rights issue.

title: Soul Parking to conclude Series A+ funding led by AppWorks dan AC Ventures
body: Soul Parking will allocate the funds raised in its Series A+ round to support domestic and international market.

title: RATU’s listing is near, RAJA secures “idA+” rating
body: PT Rukun Raharja Tbk (RAJA) has scored an “idA+” rating from Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia (Pefindo), a local rating agency, nearing the listing of one of its subsidiaries, PT Raharja Energi Cepu Tbk (RATU).

title: Planning tissue factory construction, MMIX to pair up with its Chinese partner
body: MMIX only controls a minority of the shares in the joint venture established with Fujian Nicepaper.

title: KAI completes refinancing of two bonds
body: Kereta Api Indonesia has realised the principal refinancing of its 2017 and 2019 bonds.

title: A year on the stock market, ASLI shares drop 50%
body: The stock performance of PT Asri Karya Lestari Tbk (ASLI) has dropped by 50% in the year since its debut on the stock market.

title: These are the top 5 gainers in December 2024
body: The Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) recorded the top five gainers among the 20 leading gainers for December 2024, compared to November 2024.

title: Foreign inflow into Indonesia hits IDR 212.39 trillion in 2024
body: Foreign capital inflow into Indonesia reached IDR 212.39 trillion in 2024, allocated to stock market, government bonds, and Bank Indonesia Rupiah Securities (SRBI).

title: Leo Andyanto increases stake in LAPD
body: Leo Andyanto, the ultimate beneficial owner of the shares in PT Leyand International Tbk (LAPD), has increased his stake to 7.52% following a transaction on December 30, 2024

title: Pemberton Asian owns 8.01% stake in PZZA
body: Pemberton Asian Opportunities Fund is known to have increased its stake in PT Sarimelati Kencana Tbk (PZZA) in a transaction last week (3/1).

title: Shares of 4 coal companies rise, spotlight on the top performer
body: Stocks of these 4 out of 10 coal mining issuers with market cap of over IDR 25 trillion post impressive upturns within the past year.
